response.justification: Candidate has 10+ years of full-stack experience well exceeding the 6+ requirement, with directly relevant TypeScript/Node.js work at re:cinq (including AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling) and prior Node/TypeScript/React/MongoDB experience at Optilyz and RIDE Capital. Strong polyglot background (TypeScript, Java, Python-adjacent, DLang, C/C++) and demonstrated architecture, testing, and DevOps capabilities. Gaps include no explicit Nest.js, Kotlin, or recent Vitest mention, and no clearly stated cloud-native Kubernetes-at-scale leadership, but core fit is strong.
strengths: Deep full-stack TypeScript/Node.js + React experience across multiple senior roles
Direct AI-agent and MCP tooling experience aligned with the JD
Strong testing/TDD craftsmanship and polyglot background (Java, DLang, C/C++)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js or Vitest experience listed
Kotlin not mentioned; Java experience appears older
PostgreSQL/relational DB depth unclear (MongoDB and MySQL only cited)
